title: Dollex ERP worker-inbox envelope (dx-api / dx-web / dx-db / dx-qa)
description: Messages dispatched by the orchestrator into a worker inbox.

depends_on.description: <task_id>:<worker> refs that must be complete before this task starts.

required_checks.description: Commands the worker must run before reporting type:result.

context.description: One sentence explaining why this task exists. Helps workers make judgment calls.

background.description: Optional 2-3 sentences of deeper context — prior decisions, related tasks, what failed before.

scope.description: Complexity hint: small (<30 min), medium (30-90 min), large (>90 min, expect context rotation).

files.description: Per-task file scope. write lists files this task is expected to modify.

pass_condition.description: What a passing result looks like.

checks.description: Executable checks with pass conditions. Replaces vague required_checks labels.

constraints.description: Per-task do-NOT rules the worker must obey even when they conflict with defaults.

acceptance_criteria.description: Checklist of deliverables the worker must confirm before posting type:result.

result_template.description: Skeleton JSON the worker fills in for the result body; ensures required fields are present.

baseline_task_id.description: task_id of the sprint baseline run this task builds on.
